name: Deep Book Absorption with Stability Filter
hypothesis: The parent spec (iter017_deep_book_absorption_extreme) was inconsistent, with losses attributed to 'spoofed' deep liquidity. This spec addresses the 'drop_feature' feedback by *replacing* a feature: it keeps the core absorption logic (deep bid wall `obi_ex_bbo` meets selling pressure `trade_imbalance_signed`) but adds a book shape filter (`bid_depth_concentration < 0.15`) to ensure the bid book is patient and robust (not fragile/front-loaded), which should reduce susceptibility to spoofing and improve consistency.
mutation_note: Responding to `drop_feature` and inconsistency feedback. Added a `bid_depth_concentration` filter to test if a robust book shape can stabilize the signal against spoofing.
